MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ryan J. Vlasak (415-835-6777) of Bracamontes & Vlasak for Todd Haas, plaintiff and opposing party; Certified Law Student Kevin Yee also appearing

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN WAI's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied, sufficient allegation re punitive. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
